Detailed Description

MWCAP_PCIE_CAPTURE_INFO.

Records PCIE connctions.
Related functions are MWGetFamilyInfoByIndex
MWGetFamilyInfo

Member Data Documentation

Capture board index, which is the same as the rotary number.
